news.title: Fed Meeting Minutes: AI-Fueled Inflation May Lead To Rate Hike
news.summary: Minutes of the Federal Reserve meeting on June 16-17 confirmed the hawkish tilt to monetary policy under Chairman Kevin Warsh's new leadership, noting that "upside risks to price stability remained elevated" even as downside risks to employment had moderated.  Market expectations of a Fed rate hike in September rose on Wednesday amid a jump in oil prices as the U.S. and Iran conducted tit-for-tat military strikes and President Trump warned of more to come.  Treasury yields tested their highest levels since the U.S. and Iran agreed on a peace framework and 60-day ceasefire extension on June 17.

news.title: Apple and Broadcom Shake Up Tech Sector With $30 Billion Deal
news.summary: Apple  plans to invest more than $30 billion in an extended partnership with  Broadcom  to produce custom chips, it said Wednesday.  The iPhone maker said the new agreement was the largest so far under its American Manufacturing Program and would enable Broadcom to expand and modernize its manufacturing facilities in Fort Collins, Colorado, with a $1.5 billion capital expenditure investment.  Apple shares rose 1.1% to $314.17 on Wednesday while Broadcom stock advanced 5% to $389.67, reversing earlier losses.
